main.description: RBAC policy record granting a requester the ability to register SSH public keys under a specific fedproxy service tunnel. Roles define OIDC token claims that authorize the holder; policies define JSON Schema constraints on com.atproto.repo.createRecord for com.fedproxy.sshPublicKey records.

roles.description: Map of role name → role definition. Each role defines OIDC claim constraints (aud, iss, sub) and references a policy name.

policies.description: Map of policy name → policy definition. Each policy defines a JSON Schema over com.atproto.repo.createRecord for com.fedproxy.sshPublicKey.

custom_claims_roles_index.description: Index mapping custom claim keys to role names for fast OIDC token validation lookup.
